installConfigs.instructions: Replace <your-thunder-compute-api-key> with a Thunder Compute API key from https://www.thundercompute.com/. The token is sent as 'Authorization: Bearer <token>'. Provides tooling for managing GPU instances and workloads on Thunder Compute.
